summary: Full backend + frontend testing of new features: security gate (PUG_BUD/BENJI), email converter expanded types, folder select, job detail checkboxes, bulk send + confirm modal, Claude sonnet-4-6 model upgrade.

issues: Shows 'Claude Sonnet 4.5' label but backend uses claude-sonnet-4-6 — label in /api/models name field not updated to match (minor cosmetic mismatch)

action_items: Minor: Update /api/models response name from 'Claude Sonnet 4.5' to 'Claude Sonnet 4.6' to match actual model used
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is 1351 lines — approaching split threshold (>700 recommended). Consider extracting email converter routes to a separate router module.
Grok API has no credits (xAI account) — call_grok will fail at runtime if user selects Grok model.
seed_data_creation: Test upload jobs created during testing (txt, pdf, eml, html, delete_test) — delete_test was cleaned up, others remain in ec_conversion_jobs collection.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Security gate passphrase is BENJI (stored in sessionStorage key scss_gate_v1). All EC upload types (.eml,.mbox,.pdf,.txt,.html,.htm,.msg) verified. Grok model is non-functional (no xAI credits). Claude claude-sonnet-4-6 is working. Backend server.py is 1351 lines — may need refactoring soon.
rca_of_issues: Header label shows 'Claude Sonnet 4.5' — root cause: /api/models endpoint name field still says '4.5' but model in LlmChat.with_model() call is 'claude-sonnet-4-6'. Fix: update name in models list in server.py line ~503.
